name: FORCED ORCHESTRATION RESTART
description: CRITICAL: Restart entire MIDE orchestration. Kill all worker processes, restart docker services, restart autopilot daemon. Verify services up before signaling next task.
reason: Worker autopilot is completely non-responsive. Last heartbeat was 4+ hours ago. Force full system restart.
steps: Kill all autopilot and worker python processes
Restart all services (customide, itheia-llm, ollama, code-server)
Force git fetch and poll for next task
Return diagnostics and next task ID
